visibility.publicDescription: The title and description of your report will be public. Other information such as contact details, attachments, and device info will remain private.
visibility.privateDescription: Feedback and inquiries are not published. Only the developer can review them.

fields.title: Title
fields.bugDetailPlaceholder: Explain what happened, how to reproduce it, and what you expected
fields.bugContactPlaceholder: Email address or X account (used only if the developer needs to contact you)
fields.inquiryDetailPlaceholder: Describe your feedback or question in detail
fields.inquiryContactPlaceholder: Email address or X account (used only when the developer needs to contact you)

environment.title: Environment
environment.unavailable: Device information could not be collected.

messages.bugSuccess: Your bug report has been sent. Thank you!
messages.inquirySuccess: Your feedback has been sent. Thank you!

errors.requiredFields: Please provide the title and description of your report.
